message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

participant Client
participant Proxy
participant DataAccessor

Client -> Proxy : new Proxy
activate Client
activate Proxy

Client -> Proxy : GetData(Password)

Proxy -> DataAccessor : GetData()
activate DataAccessor
DataAccessor --> Proxy : return Data
deactivate DataAccessor

Proxy -> Client : return Valid
deactivate Proxy
deactivate Client
@enduml
